description: Create a precision 2D technical drawing of a mounting plate in LibreCAD. The plate is a 300mm x 300mm square centered at (0,0) with a 150mm diameter central opening. Include 8 bolt holes (12mm diameter each) evenly spaced on a 230mm diameter bolt circle centered at (0,0), with the first hole positioned at 0 degrees (115, 0). Save the completed drawing as a DXF file to /home/ga/Documents/LibreCAD/bolt_circle_plate.dxf.
